headline: Seer and Precision Health Research, Singapore Sign Collaboration to Provide Deep, Unbiased Proteomics on 10,000 PRECISE SG100K Samples
summary: Seer’s Proteograph will be used to generate enhanced proteomic insights in one of the world’s largest multi-omic health studiesREDWOOD CITY, Calif., April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Seer, Inc. (Nasdaq: SEER), the pioneer and trusted partner for deep, unbiased proteomic insights, today announced that its Proteograph® Product Suite, has been selected as the mass spectrometry-based proteomic workflow to deeply profile the plasma proteome in 10,000 participants from PRECISE-SG100K. headline: Thermo Fisher Saladax TDM Deal Adds Dimension To Diagnostics Growth Story
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) has entered a new global distribution partnership with Saladax for advanced therapeutic drug monitoring assays. The collaboration focuses on psychiatry and oncology TDM tests, broadening access for clinical laboratories and clinicians worldwide. This move expands Thermo Fisher's clinical diagnostics offering beyond its recent financial updates and product launches. For investors tracking NYSE:TMO, this partnership adds a new angle to the story around a...

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks That Fall Short
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.

content.title: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks That Fall Short

headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific Expands Global Biobank Leadership Through Strategic Collaboration with PRECISE-SG100K Singapore to Advance Population-Scale Proteomics
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., April 09, 2026--Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE: TMO), the world leader in serving science, today announced a strategic collaboration with Precision Health Research, Singapore (PRECISE) to advance the PRECISE-SG100K study, one of the region’s most ambitious and diverse population-scale biobank initiatives. The collaboration reflects growing investments from national population studies looking to harness proteomics to drive insight into real-time disease biology for applicatio
